Player Ship Profile

EnginePlayer Judicator
Default weapons4
Base techs4
Special traits4
Base health1
Base shield10
Base shield regen10
Base armor5

The Judicator is delivered with highly effective shields.

The Judicator comes with three special weapons.

Ship Stats

HP100
Shield2000
Regen240
Armor10
Radius15
Imageplayer_judicator.png
Player accessBuyable ship
Known hangars11

Default Weapons

WeaponStart levelSlotType
Aureus Lightning01beam
Blaster02smartGun
Aureus Beam03projectile
Aureus Energy Manipulator04petSpawner

Default Upgrades

TechStart levelWhat it gives
Shield6Increases shield amount and regeneration rate. - Can block heavy hits. - Shield Bonuses scale with player level. Good vs hard hitting weapons.
Armor0Increases health and armor amount. Armor reduces damage by its value per hit. - Can restore health. - armor bonuses scale with player level. Good vs fast hitting weapons.
Engine2Increases acceleration and speed. - Can boost speed. Good in PvP.
Power0Increases power regeneration and maximum power. - Can boost damage output at the cost of power. Good for dealing more damage for longer periods.

Ship Specialties

TraitBonus
Energy damage75%
Cooldown efficiency100%
Speed40%
Max power50%
